changes.summary: Changed distRoot default from dist/ to apps/backend/src/, autoloadRoot from dist/accounting to apps/backend/src/accounting. Updated file filter from .routes.js/.js to .routes.ts/.ts. Renamed --dist-root CLI flag to --src-root. Updated error message to say 'src root'.
Updated fixture paths from positive/dist and negative/dist to positive/src and negative/src to match new source-based check.
New fixture: single autoload route plugin with no manual re-registration (positive/clean case).
New fixture: autoload route plugin for negative case.
New fixture: manually re-registers the same route function, creating the deliberate duplicate that the guard must catch.
